description_long: This is a modern double bed with a dark gray rectangular frame, featuring a solid headboard and a matching footboard. The bed is topped with a blue, grid-patterned comforter that drapes over the sides, giving it a soft and inviting appearance. Two white pillows with subtle patterns rest against the headboard, adding a touch of contrast to the overall color scheme. The frame appears sturdy and minimalistic, with straight lines and no visible decorative elements. The bedding is neatly arranged, and the mattress is slightly visible beneath the comforter at the edges. The overall design suggests a contemporary style suitable for urban interiors.
description: A modern double bed with a dark gray frame, blue grid-patterned comforter, and two white pillows. The design is minimalistic and contemporary.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the bed, blue comforter, and two white pillows against the headboard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the mattress, the drape of the comforter, and the solid headboard.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the plain, solid footboard and the overhanging comforter.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the comforter draping over the edge and the arrangement of the pillows.
